text:
New:
-Auto encoding cue file. (CP-1251/UTF8)
-Limit the number of cue tracks on the standard. (99)
-New tray menu
-Trey notice for cue
-ogg 500kbs
-Converter into ogg / vorbis.
-Client-server model.
-Optional display of video in the main window.
-Added Polish translation
